Appearances:
Plaintiff 1145 Bush Street, LP is present. Represented by Gil Dowd.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Plaise Martin is present.
Attorney Jason Lundberg representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Michael Lee, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of APR-09-2012 remains on calendar.
